case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ROBERT CHARLES WINTERSTEIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINTERSTEIN, ROBERT CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 51 6TH STREET, UNIT #209, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WINTERSTEIN, ROBERT CHARLES DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
